name: Rscript On Slurm
summary: Run R scripts on Slurm with explicit package-library and output controls.
description: This skill helps users run Rscript workloads through Slurm while keeping package libraries, working directories, logs, and output paths explicit and portable on shared HPC systems.

inputs.name: r_script
inputs.description: R script to run with Rscript.

inputs.name: r_library_path
inputs.description: User-owned R package library path, often set through R_LIBS_USER.

inputs.name: work_directory
inputs.description: User-owned working directory for logs and outputs.

outputs.name: slurm_log
outputs.description: Slurm stdout/stderr log for the R job.

outputs.name: r_session_info
outputs.description: R version, library paths, and sessionInfo output for reproducibility.

outputs.name: analysis_output
outputs.description: User-defined R outputs written under the configured output directory.

examples.title: Submit a small Rscript batch job
Base R analysis script with reproducibility output

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Check the Slurm wrapper shell syntax.
Replace account, partition, and module placeholders, then submit to a short test partition and confirm the log contains R version, library paths, and sessionInfo output.

references.title: R Installation and Administration: Managing libraries
